query:
SELECT 
  AVG(percentual_receita) as percentual_receita_medio,
  MAX(percentual_receita) as percentual_receita_maximo,
  MIN(percentual_receita) as percentual_receita_minimo
FROM (
  SELECT 
    v.nome,
    CASE 
      WHEN SUM(vd.valorTotal) > 0 THEN 
        ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN vd.mes = 'Novembro/2025' THEN vd.valorTotal ELSE 0 END) / SUM(vd.valorTotal)) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0 
    END as percentual_receita
  FROM vendedores v
  LEFT JOIN vendas_diarias vd ON v.id = vd.vendedorId
  WHERE v.metaTrimestral > 0
  GROUP BY v.id, v.nome
  HAVING SUM(vd.valorTotal) > 0
) as stats;

  MIN(percentual_receita) as percentual_receita_minimo
FROM (
  SELECT 
    v.nome,
    CASE 
      WHEN SUM(vd.valorTotal) > 0 THEN 
        ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN vd.mes = 'Novembro/2025' THEN vd.valorTotal ELSE 0 END) / SUM(vd.valorTotal)) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0 
    END as percentual_receita
  FROM vendedores v
  LEFT JOIN vendas_diarias vd ON v.id = vd.vendedorId
  WHERE v.metaTrimestral > 0
  GROUP BY v.id, v.nome
  HAVING SUM(vd.valorTotal) > 0
) as stats;
